facts.primaryTitle: Every Black Rose Predicted a Death
facts.setting: Sophie found a black rose on the counter each morning.
criticalEvents: Sophie found a black rose on the counter each morning.
Every person named on its tag died before the flower opened.
Sophie Marek was a florist returning home after her grandmother's death when the story began in a family-owned flower shop in Prague.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: Sophie found a black rose on the counter each morning.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Sophie Marek defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
